race.comment: BURLEIGH (3) doesn't win out of turn but looks well placed here. Winner three back then has been fifth in the two runs since. Both beaten less than two lengths and will find this easier. Gets chance to return to winning form. WHERE'S MY SOCK (9) is a progressive type who was a dominant maiden winner last time. Has upside and can measure up again. THUNDER HAWK (1) has been racing in tougher races at Cranbourne lately and looks well placed this line-up. Great chance to atone. A BEACH IN JUNE (8) resumes from a long break and did place when last resuming. Worth thought. BAMA SLAMA (5) has a tricky gate but good speed and can take catching.
